_notes: Phase DX.2 — tunable vocabulary for macOS SwiftUI apps. Smaller than web because SwiftUI has fewer idiomatic tuning points: tint, density spacing, window chrome. Bindings target `swiftui-environment` — the generator is expected (via wisdom rule) to emit SwiftUI code that reads from an `@Environment(\.designTokens)` object. App-side live-reload is a TODO (DX.2 Swift scope); today dragging sliders here stores the values into session state and they take effect on the NEXT generation. Still useful because the planner gets them as hints for future passes.

tunables.safetyNote: Driving regeneration-only today. 'sidebar' triggers a NavigationSplitView scaffold; 'tab-bar' triggers TabView; 'none' stays single-window.
